description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script that exports GOPATH=$(pwd) and a single build stage. Add a compile-go-1.4 job using the golang:1.4 image that runs `git submodule update --init`, then `(go build recaptcha.go; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then exit 66; fi);`, `go get google.golang.org/appengine`, `mkdir -p src/gitlab.com/chriseaton/`, `ln -s $(pwd) src/gitlab.com/chriseaton/recaptcha`, and `(for f in examples/*.go; do echo "-> go build $f"; go build $f; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then exit 66; fi; done);`. Add a compile-go-1.5 job identical to the previous one but using the golang:1.5 image. Add a vet job also on golang:1.5 that runs `go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false ./*.go`, `go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false examples/*.go`, and `go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false examples/appengine/*.go`. No caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
